distinct_errors: JSON_IR_SCHEMA_DESIGN_ERROR: Predicate 'has_legal_personality' (kind=observable) looks like a status/classification name. Final legal conclusions defined by the scoped law must be kind=derived with defining rules. Repair layer: symbols.
